case_title: TWINE JUDITH C VS BEST SAN FRANCISCO MODEL & TALENT AGENCY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEST SAN FRANCISCO MODEL & TALENT AGENCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TWINE JUDITH C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST SAN FRANCISCO MODEL & TALENT AGENCY $260.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00, TWO PAYMENTS- IST PAYMENT ON OR BEFORE 4/1/93 2ND PAYMT ON OR BEFORE 5/1/93 ($157.50 EACH PAYMT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
